posts.text:
This is insanity. 

To be clear, not attacking TSA workers in need. 

But insanity that this is needed.


Denver Int'l Airport (@DENAirport)

❗DONATIONS NEEDED❗ Support the dedicated TSA employees working without pay by donating $10 and $20 grocery store and gas gift cards. Visa gift cards cannot be accepted. 

Drop off locations can be found at Final Approach cell phone lot and in the Jeppesen Terminal.




— https://nitter.net/DENAirport/status/2031788433933250627#m

My understanding is this food was for the men and women in our armed forces - and as far as I'm concerned they can have caviar and champagne every day given they are putting their literal lives on the line for our protection.


Mediaite (@Mediaite)

Pete Hegseth’s Defense Department Blew $22M On Steak and Lobster in a Single Month, Watchdog Claims
mediaite.com/politics/pete-h…

Community note: Important context, members of the United States military have been served “Surf and Turf” for decades,
Why did everyone question the Covid vaccine but not ozempic. Vanity is a horror
Man was not meant to monitor this many situations.

Shut the fuck up Sheryl Sandberg. I don't even know why you're still talking given the amount of abject lies and insanity you tried to sell my generation.


People (@people)

Lean In's Sheryl Sandberg Says Tradwives Could Be 'Very Detrimental to Women,' Even If by Accident (Exclusive) people.com/sheryl-sandberg-t…




— https://nitter.net/people/status/2031504402175947167#m

He was not, actually.


Mikey (@GaintrustMikey)

He was at your wedding, Meghan.

(This is a callback joke)



— https://nitter.net/GaintrustMikey/status/2031713209959272584#m

Nothing like a single, childless, septuagenarian telling American mothers to send their children to go possibly die in a war.


AF Post (@AFpost)

Sen. Lindsey Graham: “I'm going back to South Carolina and asking them to send their sons and daughters over to the MidEast.” 

Follow: @AFpost

Video
  




— https://nitter.net/AFpost/status/2031227161672298867#m

Also, if you feel called, and we know each other a bit professionally/in real life, and you're able to come into Manhattan, I would be happy to give you the funeral details via DM. I would like to mourn with people, and I would like to have babies and children there especially.

Please join me in sending prayers, strength and light to Liz, her family, loved ones and baby Solomon. I do not understand the will of God and don’t pretend to.


Liz Wolfe (@LizWolfeReason)

King Solomon died yesterday at two and a half months old. We loved him really well, and we don't have any regrets. We got nine days at home with him after 61 days in the NICU. Nine will never feel like enough, but we must accept what is given to us––we were never in control.

Let's take stock of all God's m

In a normal world, this is who the Mayor of New York City would have hosted for dinner at his home, instead of a man who sympathizes with the folks throwing the bomb.


NYPD NEWS (@NYPDnews)

Some heroes wear capes — Chief Aaron Edwards wears blue.




— https://nitter.net/NYPDnews/status/2031179948916904113#m

A liberal man in NYC yelling that “everyone is welcome” — as an ISIS supporter throws a bomb over him.

Hang this clip in the Louvre.

Video

Stu Smith (@thestustustudio)

These are the kinds of protest photos that instantly become historical record. Amir Balat lighting the bomb in one frame, and an NYPD officer mid-air over the fence in the next, already in pursuit.

Rarely do still images preserve both the act itself and the split-second response this clearly.





— https://nitter.net/thestustustudio/status/2031004758736085364#m

I hope they’ve remembered to bring their jukebox money.


BBC News (World) (@BBCWorld)

B-52s arrive at UK air base amid conflict with Iran bbc.in/4aYPELx




— https://nitter.net/BBCWorld/status/2031001963064639577#m
About to join my friends @GaydosKTAR & @TheBruceStJames on @OutspokenKTAR at the top of the hour for "Monday's with Meghan". Tune into @KTAR923 Arizonans!

One of my great childhood fears come to life…


Dan Nowicki (@dannowicki)

"Quicksand warning for Arizona’s Glen Canyon near Lake Powell." (via @Jflevin) azcentral.com/story/news/loc…




— https://nitter.net/dannowicki/status/2031103368358408284#m
Mamdani Clarifies That His Wife Only Celebrates Terrorism In Her Capacity As A Private Citizen buff.ly/FBGKO2a

Keep the fat comments coming because I'm sorry to disappoint so many of you, I will not be going on any of the ozempic shots despite just having my third child.

No judgment to those that do, but I just don't believe in the concept of a magic shot - everything has a price.

*I also don't want my face to change.
